**INTERNAL DEAL MEMO**

**Project Codename: Operation Sunrise**

Date: 25th October 2023

From: Dr. Adrian Lim (NRIC: S2345678B)
To: Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah
CC: Mr. Ramasamy Muthu

Subject: Potential Acquisition of StellarTech Pte. Ltd.

We are in the preliminary stages of discussing the potential acquisition of StellarTech Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12LL3456D), a leading innovator in AI-driven solutions. The proposed transaction value is estimated at SGD 35 million, subject to due diligence and regulatory approvals. 

All communications should be directed to Dr. Adrian Lim via email at adrian.lim@fictcorp.sg or telephone at +65 6123 4567. Please maintain confidentiality regarding this project until further notice.

Thank you.

Dr. Adrian Lim  
Chief Strategy Officer  
Fictitious Corporation
